flows: dashboardactivity -> app -> mainactivity
mainactivity -> signinactivity
mainactivity -> userlistactivity
flow 1: user -> app -> main -> signin -> userlist
flow 2: none
the diagram models the flow of the application's main activities.
the user starts the application, which leads to the main activity.
the main activity has two possible paths: signing in or listing users.
the user can sign in or list users, and then the application will return to the main activity.
home -> click su "weather" — type=association; label="click on weather"; explanation="user clicks on weather"
click su "weather" -> visualizzazione meteo della località attuale — type=association; label="display local weather"; explanation="display local weather"
visualizzazione meteo della località attuale -> click su lente d'ingrandimento — type=association; label="zoom in"; explanation="zoom in"
click su lente d'ingrandimento -> ricerca meteo di altre località — type=association; label="search weather of other locations"; explanation="search weather of other locations"
flow 1: home -> click su "weather" -> visualizzazione meteo della località attuale -> click su lente d'ingrandimento -> ricerca meteo di altre località
the diagram models the process of a user interacting with a home page to view and search for weather information.
the user clicks on the "weather" button, which displays the local weather, and then can zoom in or search for weather of other locations.
the user can choose to search for weather of other locations or not.
user -> applicazione — type: message; label: "click su 'trekking'"; explanation: "user clicks on 'trekking'"
applicazione -> richiesta elenco province — type: message; label: "richiesta elenco province"; explanation: "application requests province list"
richiesta elenco province -> fornisce elenco province — type: message; label: "fornisce elenco province"; explanation: "provides province list"
fornisce elenco province -> click sulla provincia — type: message; label: "click sulla provincia"; explanation: "click on province"
click sulla provincia -> richiesta elenco percorsi — type: message; label: "richiesta elenco percorsi"; explanation: "requests route list"
richiesta elenco percorsi -> invio elenco percorsi — type: message; label: "invio elenco percorsi"; explanation: "sends route list"
invio elenco percorsi -> fornisce elenco province — type: message; label: "fornisce elenco province"; explanation: "provides province list"
fornisce elenco province -> click sul percorso nella provincia selezionata — type: message; label: "click sul percorso nella provincia selezionata"; explanation: "click on selected province route"
click sul percorso nella provincia selezionata -> applicazione — type: message; label: "applicazione"; explanation: "application"

flow 1: user -> applicazione -> richiesta elenco province -> fornisce elenco province -> click sulla provincia -> richiesta elenco percorsi -> invio elenco percorsi -> fornisce elenco province -> click sul percorso nella provincia selezionata -> applicazione
the diagram models a user interacting with an application to select a province and then a route within that province.
the application sends a request for the province list, which is then provided.
the user selects a province and then a route, which is sent to the application.
the application processes the request and provides the selected route.
the user can repeat this process for different provinces and routes.
user -> applicazione — type: message; label: "click su 'weather'"; explanation: user clicks on the "weather" button
applicazione -> server — type: message; label: "richiesta dati meteo"; explanation: application requests weather data
server -> applicazione — type: message; label: "invio dati metoe"; explanation: server sends weather data
flow 1: user -> applicazione -> server -> user
user clicks on the "weather" button
application requests weather data from the server
server sends weather data to the user
the diagram models a simple interaction between a user, an application, and a server.
the user interacts with the application by clicking on the "weather" button.
the application requests weather data from the server and receives it in return.
the user receives the weather data from the application.
user -> applicazione — type=message; label="click su 'health'"; explanation="click on 'health'"
applicazione -> server — type=message; label="richiesta dati allenamenti passati"; explanation="request passed training data"
server -> applicazione — type=message; label="invio dati"; explanation="send data"
applicazione -> user — type=message; label="fornisce elenco allenamenti"; explanation="provides training list"
flow 1: click su "health" -> richiesta dati allenamenti passati -> invio dati -> fornisce elenco allenamenti
the diagram models a user interacting with an application to request and receive health-related data from a server.
the application processes the request and sends the data to the user.
the user can click on "health" to initiate the process.
the server provides the requested data to the application, which then sends it to the user.
the user receives the list of health-related data.
validations: click su lente d'ingrandimento: si -> no
click sulla provincia -> richiesta elenco percorsi
click sul percorso nella provincia selezionata -> applicazione
